moments.title: Wimbledon Championships Live
moments.blurb: The 139th edition of The Championships, Wimbledon, the world's most prestigious tennis tournament, is underway at the All England Club in London, running from June 29 to July 12, 2026.

angles.name: Centre Court Action
angles.copy: The grass courts are buzzing! Wimbledon 2026 is LIVE with thrilling matches and unexpected upsets already making headlines. Who are you backing for the singles titles this year?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream are out, and the tension is high! As Wimbledon continues, all eyes are on the British hopefuls. Can anyone make a deep run this year?

moments.title: F1 British Grand Prix
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Pirelli British Grand Prix 2026 takes place this weekend, July 3-5, at the iconic Silverstone Circuit, marking Round 9 of the 2026 FIA Formula One World Championship.

angles.name: Silverstone Showdown
angles.copy: Engines revving for the British Grand Prix at Silverstone this weekend! Practice 1 and Sprint Qualifying kick off tomorrow (July 3rd). Who will master the legendary circuit?

angles.name: Home Soil Advantage
angles.copy: All eyes on Silverstone as the F1 British Grand Prix approaches. Can a home favourite take the chequered flag? It's set to be an electrifying race weekend!

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Quarter-Finals
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026, co-hosted by the USA, Canada, and Mexico, reaches its Quarter-Final stage from July 9-11, with teams battling for a spot in the semi-finals.

angles.name: World Cup Heat
angles.copy: The World Cup Quarter-Finals are just a week away! The tension is building as the biggest teams battle it out for a place in the semis. Who's making it through?

angles.name: Crunch Time
angles.copy: From July 9th, it's crunch time at the World Cup! The Quarter-Finals promise high drama and unforgettable moments. Which nation will keep their dream alive?

moments.title: Wireless Festival 2026
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival returns to Finsbury Park, London, from July 10-12, 2026, featuring headliners like 21 Savage, Doja Cat, and J Hus, alongside a stellar line-up of hip-hop, rap, and R&B artists.

angles.name: London's Hottest Festival
angles.copy: Wireless Festival takes over Finsbury Park next weekend! London is about to get lit with 21 Savage, Doja Cat, J Hus and more. Who are you hyped to see?

angles.name: Weekend Warm-Up
angles.copy: Counting down to Wireless 2026! Get ready for a massive weekend of the biggest names in hip-hop and R&B. What's your must-see act on the lineup?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival 2026
moments.blurb: TRNSMT Festival brings a huge weekend of music to Glasgow Green from July 11-13, 2026, with headliners including Liam Gallagher, Gerry Cinnamon, and Calvin Harris.

angles.name: Glasgow Green Takeover
angles.copy: TRNSMT Festival is almost here! Glasgow Green is about to erupt with Liam Gallagher, Gerry Cinnamon, Calvin Harris and so many more. Who's ready for a huge weekend?

angles.name: Scottish Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Get your festival gear ready! TRNSMT 2026 is next weekend in Glasgow. Which rock and indie legends are you most excited to see hit the stage?

moments.title: Love Island UK Ongoing
moments.blurb: The latest series of the popular reality dating show Love Island UK is in full swing, with daily drama, romance, and re-couplings keeping viewers hooked throughout the summer.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of drama in the Love Island villa! Who's coupling up, who's cracking on, and who's heading home? Tune in tonight!

angles.name: Hot Takes
angles.copy: Love Island UK is giving us all the feels this summer! What's been the biggest shocker in the villa so far? Let us know your hot takes!

moments.title: UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart is set to reveal its latest number one this Friday, with speculation mounting over whether a new artist will claim the top spot or if a current hit will hold strong.

angles.name: Chart Race
angles.copy: The race for the UK Number 1 is on! Will your favourite track take the top spot this week or is there a new contender rising fast? All will be revealed Friday!

angles.name: New Music Friday Prep
angles.copy: New music Friday is almost here, and with it, the latest Official UK Singles Chart! What song are you hoping to see at the top?

moments.title: Post Malone Turns 31
moments.blurb: American rapper, singer, and songwriter Post Malone, known for hits like 'Circles' and 'Sunflower', celebrates his 31st birthday on July 4th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Posty
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 31st birthday to the one and only Post Malone on July 4th! What's your favourite Posty track to blast out?

angles.name: Celebrating a Star
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Post Malone turns 31 this Friday! From 'Rockstar' to 'Sunflower', he's given us so many bangers. What's your go-to Posty tune?

moments.title: Tribute to Bill Withers (Would be 88)
moments.blurb: Legendary soul and R&B singer-songwriter Bill Withers, known for iconic songs like 'Lean on Me' and 'Ain't No Sunshine', would have celebrated his 88th birthday on July 4th.

angles.name: Remembering a Legend
angles.copy: On July 4th, we pay tribute to the incredible Bill Withers, who would have been 88. His timeless classics continue to inspire and uplift. What's your favourite Bill Withers song?

angles.name: Soulful Legacy
angles.copy: Thinking of the incomparable Bill Withers, who would have turned 88 this Friday. His soulful voice and profound lyrics live on forever. 'Lean on Me' is always a good idea.

moments.title: 50 Cent Turns 51
moments.blurb: Grammy Award-winning rapper, actor, and entrepreneur 50 Cent, born Curtis Jackson, celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: G-Unit General's B-Day
angles.copy: It's 50 Cent's birthday on July 6th! The hip-hop icon turns 51. What's your ultimate 50 Cent anthem to get the party started?

angles.name: Celebrating a Legend
angles.copy: Happy 51st birthday to the one and only 50 Cent this Monday! From 'In Da Club' to 'Candy Shop', his tracks defined an era. What's your favourite?

moments.title: Ringo Starr Turns 86
moments.blurb: Sir Richard Starkey, better known as Ringo Starr, the legendary drummer for The Beatles, celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Peace & Love for Ringo
angles.copy: Happy 86th Birthday to the iconic Ringo Starr on July 7th! The legendary Beatles drummer continues to spread peace and love. What's your favourite Ringo moment?

angles.name: Beatles Drummer's Day
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr this Tuesday! From 'Yellow Submarine' to his solo hits, his legacy is immense. Peace and Love!

moments.title: Courtney Love Turns 62
moments.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and actress Courtney Love, frontwoman of the band Hole and a significant figure in the 90s alternative rock scene, celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Rock Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 62nd birthday to the fierce and unforgettable Courtney Love on July 9th! What's your favourite Hole track or Courtney moment?

angles.name: 90s Grunge Queen
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Courtney Love, who turns 62 this week! A true icon of 90s grunge and rock. What's your go-to Hole song?

moments.title: Jack White Turns 51
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning musician, singer, and songwriter Jack White, best known as the frontman of The White Stripes, celebrates his 51st birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Rock God's Big Day
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the guitar wizard Jack White on July 9th! From The White Stripes to his solo work, he's a true rock visionary. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: White Stripes Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating Jack White's 51st birthday this week! The man behind The White Stripes, The Raconteurs, and The Dead Weather. A modern rock legend!

moments.title: Jessica Simpson Turns 46
moments.blurb: American singer, actress, and fashion designer Jessica Simpson, known for her pop hits and reality TV, celebrates her 46th birthday on July 10th.

angles.name: Pop Princess B-Day
angles.copy: Happy 46th birthday to the one and only Jessica Simpson on July 10th! From 'I Wanna Love You Forever' to 'With You', she gave us so many bops. What's your favourite?

angles.name: Celebrating Jessica
angles.copy: It's Jessica Simpson's 46th birthday this Thursday! A multi-talented star who's been making headlines for decades. What's your favourite Jessica Simpson moment?

moments.title: Tribute to Christine McVie (Would be 83)
moments.blurb: Christine McVie, the iconic singer-songwriter and keyboardist of Fleetwood Mac, who passed away in 2022, would have celebrated her 83rd birthday on July 12th.

angles.name: Remembering Christine
angles.copy: On July 12th, we remember the incredible Christine McVie of Fleetwood Mac, who would have been 83. Her voice and songwriting shaped a generation. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Fleetwood Mac Legend
angles.copy: Forever in our hearts. Christine McVie, the legendary voice of Fleetwood Mac, would have turned 83 this Friday. Her music continues to inspire and comfort.
